Author: Allison
EnhancedContent: [GitHub Copilot usage metrics reports](https://docs.github.com/enterprise-cloud@latest/rest/copilot/copilot-usage-metrics?apiVersion=2022-11-28) now return a consistent `user_login` value for Enterprise Managed Users (EMU). Previously, some reports could include a suffix in `user_login` , which made it harder to match results across GitHub APIs.
Description:
GitHub Copilot usage metrics reports now return a consistent user\_login value for Enterprise Managed Users (EMU). Previously, some reports could include a suffix in user\_login, which made it harder to…

The post [Copilot metrics reports now return consistent usernames for Enterprise Managed Users](https://github.blog/changelog/2026-03-02-copilot-metrics-reports-now-return-consistent-usernames-for-enterprise-managed-users) appeared first on [The GitHub Blog](https://github.blog).
Title: Copilot metrics reports now return consistent usernames for Enterprise Managed Users
